meta.title: NoraMedi Pricing | Dental Clinic CRM Plans
meta.description: Compare NoraMedi dental clinic CRM plans, AI conversation packages, storage, SMS, setup, and data migration fees.

hero.title: NoraMedi Plans and Pricing
hero.subtitle: From clinic management to AI-assisted patient communication, choose the plan and add-on services that fit your needs.
hero.commonNote: Unlimited users, practitioners, and devices on every plan.

comparison.label: Comparison
comparison.title: Detailed Plan Comparison
comparison.description: Compare all features of the three plans by category.
comparison.mobileHint: Scroll the table horizontally to see all columns.

aiAddons.label: Add-on Services
aiAddons.title: Additional AI Conversation Packages
aiAddons.description: Usable in addition to the 500 monthly conversation quota on the Smart Clinic plan.
notes: Unused allowance does not roll over to the next month
Additional channels share the same clinic AI quota
aiAddons.definition: An AI-assisted conversation is one the standard system flow cannot handle, where AI steps in.
aiAddons.definitionNote: Conversations handled by the standard system flow or by staff are not counted toward the AI quota.
aiAddons.sessionNote: Conversation session duration is defined in the contract terms.

storageAddons.title: Additional File Storage
storageAddons.description: Usable for patient documents, photos, PDF files, and lab attachments.
storageAddons.dicomNote: X-ray, DICOM, and CBCT imaging storage are not included in the general file quota.
storageAddons.dicomDescription: X-ray and DICOM imaging storage is priced separately based on usage volume and backup needs.

channelAddons.title: Additional Communication Channels
notes: The Smart Clinic plan includes 1 WhatsApp line and 1 Instagram account
The Enterprise plan includes one connection per clinic
Additional channels share the same clinic AI quota
Meta messaging fees are not included in the subscription price
Third-party service fees are billed separately

sms.title: NoraMedi SMS Packages
sms.subtitle: Manage your SMS credits through NoraMedi for appointment reminders, notifications, and patient communication.
sms.infoNote: All SMS messages are sent through NoraMedi. You do not need to open or connect a separate SMS provider account.
sms.trackingNote: Your SMS balance, sending history, and delivery status (where available) are tracked through NoraMedi.
sms.billingNote: SMS packages are one-time credit purchases, independent of your main subscription plan.
sms.activationNote: SMS packages are assigned to your account by our sales team.
usageNotes: Long messages and messages containing accented, emoji, or other Unicode characters may use more than one SMS credit depending on technical length.
The credit policy for failed or undelivered SMS messages is determined by the provider result and NoraMedi's terms of use.
SMS prices may be updated based on changes in carrier and SMS provider costs.

professional.title: Smart Clinic Setup
items: Basic configuration of automated communication flows

enterprise.title: Enterprise Setup
enterprise.description: The final setup fee is quoted based on the number of clinics, data migration, and integration scope.

migration.title: Data Migration Packages
migration.topNote: Sample data is analyzed free of charge before final pricing.
migration.note: Patient documents, photos, X-ray/DICOM, irregular Excel files, duplicate-record merging, and custom API development are evaluated separately.
migration.generalDescription: Data migration prices vary based on the structure of the source system, record count, and data quality. The final price is provided after a free data analysis.

training.title: Training and Custom Services
training.note: Travel and accommodation costs for on-site training are billed separately.

capacity.title: Additional Active Patient Capacity
capacity.definition: A patient with an appointment, treatment, payment, or communication activity within the last 24 months is considered an active patient.
capacity.archiveNote: Archived past patient records are not deleted. A record becomes active again once new activity occurs for that patient.
capacity.note: For higher patient-capacity needs on the Starter plan, we recommend upgrading to the Smart Clinic plan.

yearlyDiscount.question: How does the yearly plan discount work?
yearlyDiscount.answer: With yearly billing you pay for 10 months and get 12 months of access. Payment is collected upfront.

setupPerClinic.question: Is the setup fee charged per clinic?
setupPerClinic.answer: Yes, the setup fee is charged per clinic.

aiDeduction.question: When is an AI conversation deducted from the quota?
aiDeduction.answer: Only conversations the standard system flow could not handle, where AI steps in, are deducted from the quota.

aiRollover.question: Do unused AI conversations roll over to the next month?
aiRollover.answer: No, the monthly AI conversation quota does not roll over.

metaFees.question: Are Meta messaging fees included in the plan?
metaFees.answer: No, Meta's (WhatsApp/Instagram) messaging fees are not included in the subscription price and are billed separately.

smsFees.question: Are SMS fees included in the plan?
smsFees.answer: No. SMS usage is separate from the main subscription plans. You can purchase the NoraMedi SMS credit package that fits your needs separately. You do not need to connect a separate SMS provider account.

ownChannels.question: Can I use my own WhatsApp or Instagram account?
ownChannels.answer: Yes, you can connect your existing WhatsApp line and Instagram account to NoraMedi.

activePatientDefinition.question: How is an active patient calculated?
activePatientDefinition.answer: Patients with an appointment, treatment, payment, or communication activity within the last 24 months are counted as active.

archivedPatients.question: Are archived patients deleted?
archivedPatients.answer: No, archived patient records are not deleted. A record becomes active again once new activity occurs for that patient.

dicomStorage.question: Is X-ray and DICOM included in file storage?
dicomStorage.answer: No, X-ray and DICOM/CBCT imaging storage is separate from the general file quota and is priced separately based on usage volume.

migrationPriceVariance.question: Why can the data migration price vary?
migrationPriceVariance.answer: The price depends on the structure of the source system, record count, and data quality. The final price is provided after a free data analysis.

planUpgrade.question: Can I upgrade my plan later?
planUpgrade.answer: Yes, you can upgrade your plan later as your clinic's needs grow.

addonPurchaseLater.question: Can I purchase additional AI or storage packages later?
addonPurchaseLater.answer: Yes, these packages can be added to your existing subscription at any time.

enterprisePricing.question: How is the Enterprise plan priced?
enterprisePricing.answer: The Enterprise plan is custom-quoted based on the number of clinics, patient volume, and communication needs.

yearlyAddonDiscount.question: Do yearly add-on packages also get 2 months free?
yearlyAddonDiscount.answer: Yes, the yearly option for AI, storage, and active patient capacity packages also follows the pay-for-10-months, use-for-12-months rule.

extraChannelAiQuota.question: How is the AI quota calculated for additional channel connections?
extraChannelAiQuota.answer: Additional WhatsApp, Instagram, or website chatbot connections share the same clinic AI conversation quota; no separate quota is defined per channel.

finalCta.title: Let's find the right plan for your clinic together
finalCta.description: We'll build the plan that best fits your number of clinics, patient volume, and communication needs.

generalNotes.title: General Pricing Notes
items: All yearly plans provide 12 months of access for the price of 10 months.
The setup fee is charged per clinic.
SMS and Meta messaging fees are not included in the subscription price.
Third-party service fees are billed separately.
Data migration, custom integration, and on-site training are priced separately.
General file storage and X-ray/DICOM storage are evaluated separately.
Unused monthly AI conversation allowance does not roll over.
Prices may be updated based on service and third-party costs.
